The '''Light Attack Fighter Model 250''', commonly known as the '''LAF-250 starfighter''', was a light [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] used primarily by the [[Corellian Defense Force/Legends|Corellian Defense Force]], having been created to police the [[Corellian sector/Legends|Corellian sector]].

Designed by the [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]] and built under the aegis of the [[Republic Engineering Corporation]], the LAF-250 was designed to combine the traditional role of a starfighter with patrol duties.

==Characteristics==
The design was reasonably maneuverable, and capable of extended patrols of up to 48 hours, but shielding, speed, and hull armor were no more than moderate. In particular, the design's weapons loadout was light, consisting of just a pair of light [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]]. While suitable for police work, the '250 was no match for well-equipped [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]].

==History==
Designed by the [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]] and built under the aegis of the [[Republic Engineering Corporation]], the LAF-250 was designed to combine the traditional role of a starfighter with patrol duties. Their performance was not always exemplary, however, and after an entire wing of these starfighters was destroyed by one old [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|Nebulon-B frigate]], the Corellian Defense Force demanded modifications to give the design greater speed and combat capabilities. Manufacturers complied, and the modified version proved more successful, eventually redesignated the [[Heavy/Light Attack Fighter 500|HLAF-500]].

==Appearances==

*''[[Assault at Selonia]]''
*''[[Showdown at Centerpoint]]''
